events.name: MOVE
events.description: Hero move intent applied by the hero-nav authority

events.name: ATTACK
events.description: Bump-attack intent applied by the dungeon-combat authority

events.name: MONSTER_TICK
events.description: Advances enemy chase AI and applies hero contact damage via the dungeon-combat authority

events.name: PLAY_AGAIN
events.description: Resets every mechanic (units/enemies/HP, objectives, result) for a new run
